# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a TypeScript Express endpoint for serving user-uploaded files. Users request files by name via req.params.filename. Use fs.readFile with path.join to read from uploads directory. Support subdirectories for organization. Type the filename parameter as string. This is for our file storage API.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import * as path from 'path';

const app = express();
const UPLOADS_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'uploads');

interface FileParams {
  filename: string;
}

app.get('/files/:filename(*)', async (req: Request<FileParams>, res: Response) => {
  const filename: string = req.params.filename;

  if (!filename || filename.trim() === '') {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Filename is required' });
  }

  const requestedPath = path.join(UPLOADS_DIR, filename);
  const canonicalPath = path.resolve(requestedPath);
  const canonicalBase = path.resolve(UPLOADS_DIR);

  if (!canonicalPath.startsWith(canonicalBase + path.sep) && canonicalPath !== canonicalBase) {
    return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Access denied' });
  }

  fs.readFile(canonicalPath, (err, data) => {
    if (err) {
      if (err.code === 'ENOENT') {
        return res.status(404).json({ error: 'File not found' });
      }
      if (err.code === 'EISDIR') {
        return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Path is a directory' });
      }
      return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Error reading file' });
    }

    const ext = path.extname(canonicalPath).toLowerCase();
    const mimeTypes: { [key: string]: string } = {
      '.txt': 'text/plain',
      '.pdf': 'application/pdf',
      '.jpg': 'image/jpeg',
      '.jpeg': 'image/jpeg',
      '.png': 'image/png',
      '.gif': 'image/gif',
      '.json': 'application/json',
      '.html': 'text/html',
      '.css': 'text/css',
      '.js': 'application/javascript',
    };

    const contentType = mimeTypes[ext] || 'application/octet-stream';
    res.setHeader('Content-Type', contentType);
    res.send(data);
  });
});

app.listen(3000, () => {
  console.log('Server running on port 3000');
});
